description: Decode in.mp4 -> route the audio stream into a whisper_stt node, which transcribes it locally (whisper.cpp, offline) and writes transcript.json (a JSON array of {start,end,text,confidence}); the audio passes through and is re-encoded to AAC while the video is stream-copied -> out.mp4. Requires a with_whisper build and a ggml model.
ffmpeg_cmd: # No equivalent FFmpeg command — whisper_stt (node "stt") has no FFmpeg equivalent.
